isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro]
When did I start to notice your blue eyes?
They wash me dry as they both locked with mine
When did I notice something's missing now?
When you're not around I start to look for signs

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you imagine if we were meant to be?
All of those clandestine gaze won't mean a thing
When all is gone, you'll see that love stands strong

[Chorus]
What if I say that I am falling deeper, every time you smile?
You're the light that shines, my starless skies
Oh it's you I dearly pine
What if I say that I'm not ready to movе on?
Hold me in your arms
I will stand by you, please givе a clue
Can you say those words?
It starts with "I love you"
(I love you, I love you, I love you)

[Pre-Chorus]
How can you live in a world without a song?
And you're the one thing I cannot live without
When all is gone, you'll see that love stands strong

[Chorus]
What if I say that I am falling deeper, every time you smile?
You're the light that shines, my starless skies
Oh it's you I dearly pine

[Bridge]
Can you feel the love that's gushing after us?
Is it with you I found
Who I really am?

[Chorus]
You're the light that shines, my starless skies
Oh it's you I dearly pine
What if I say that I'm not ready to move on?
Hold me in your arms
I will stand by you, please give a clue
Can you say those words?
It starts with "I love you"
I love you, I love you, I love you

[Outro]
These are the words that I can never say to you
